name: Libas Consumer Products Limited
summary: Libas Consumer Products Limited engages in the process of fabrication of fabric into garments and other products in India. The company offers fabrics, sherwanis, kurtis, shoes, and other related items, as well as various men and women accessories, curtains, etc. It markets its products under the LIBAS RIYAZ GANGJI and LIBAS reshma riyaz gangji brands. The company offers its products through its retail stores, Shoppers Shop, online retailers, and its website. The company was formerly known as Libas Designs Limited and changed its name to Libas Consumer Products Limited in November 2020. Libas Consumer Products Limited was incorporated in 2004 and is based in Mumbai, India.
